# tidy_summarised_result { #cdmconnector.tidy_summarised_result }

```python
tidy_summarised_result(
    result,
    settings_column=None,
    pivot_estimates_by='estimate_name',
)
```

Tidy a summarised result: keep long form; optionally pivot estimate_value by estimate_name.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name               | Type        | Description                                                                      | Default           |
|--------------------|-------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------|
| result             | DataFrame   | Summarised result (standard columns).                                            | _required_        |
| settings_column    | list        | Settings columns to join (from settings table); not implemented here.            | `None`            |
| pivot_estimates_by | str or None | If "estimate_name", pivot estimate_value so each estimate_name becomes a column. | `'estimate_name'` |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type      | Description   |
|--------|-----------|---------------|
|        | DataFrame |               |
